description: Look up a deployed smart contract by address. Returns sourceCode, byteCodeObjects, deployer, transactionsCount and createTime.

contract.sourceCode:
import com.credits.scapi.v0.SmartContract;

public class BasicCounter extends SmartContract { ... }

notes: Aliases: 'Address' is also accepted. transactionsCount is the number of execute calls registered against the contract since deploy. The byteCode field is base64. Pass it back to /SmartContract/Methods (byteCodeObjects mode) to enumerate the available methods.
